recalls.Description: The Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Sets, featuring branding from either Garden Games or Big Game Hunters on the storage bag, are being recalled. Each set includes four adult mallets, two winning posts, a red and blue children's mallet, six balls, clips, hoops, and a storage bag. The bags are identifiable by a Big Game Hunters logo on a blue bag or a Garden Games logo on a green bag.
recalls.Title: Recall of Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Sets Due to Lead and Phthalate Violations; Available Exclusively on Amazon by DOM Sports
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach DOM Sports at 877-725-5056 between 8:30 a.m. and 4:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, email support@domsports.com, or visit www.domsports.com/recalls.html for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Set - Big Game Hunters branded
Recalled Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Set - Garden Games branded

Manufacturers.Name: Garden Games Ltd, of United Kingdom

Retailers.Name: Available on Amazon.com from May 2015 through June 2021 for approximately $225.

Importers.Name: DOM Enterprises & Mfg. Ltd, dba DOM Sports, of Canada

Hazards.Name: The paint or surface coating on the red mallet, blue mallet, red hoop, and winning post contains lead levels that exceed federal limits, creating a risk of lead poisoning. Additionally, the coatings on the red and blue mallets have phthalate levels that surpass regulatory limits, posing health risks if ingested by young children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers are advised to stop using the recalled croquet sets and contact DOM Sports for instructions on emailing a photo of the disposed product to support@domsports.com in order to receive free replacement parts. DOM Sports and Amazon are reaching out to all known buyers.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Sandford Family 6-Player Croquet Sets due to lead and phthalate violations. Contact DOM Sports for replacement parts.
